documentation.name: README.md
documentation.summary: Developer guide for the Flagsmith API covering local setup, testing, metrics, structured logging, feature flags, migrations, typing, and the Django app architecture conventions.

infrastructure.name: Makefile
infrastructure.summary: Build and developer-workflow automation defining 28 targets for installing dependencies, linting, type-checking, running tests, managing Docker services, applying Django migrations, serving the app, and generating OpenAPI SDK and integration client types.

infrastructure.name: Procfile
infrastructure.summary: Process-type declaration defining the release migration step and the gunicorn-served web process for the Flagsmith WSGI application.

config.name: .env-ci
config.summary: Environment variable defaults loaded during continuous-integration test runs for the Flagsmith API.

config.name: .env-local
config.summary: Environment variable defaults for local development of the Flagsmith API server and database.

config.name: openapi-filter-flagsmith-sdk.yml
config.summary: openapi-format filter rules used when generating the published Flagsmith SDK OpenAPI schema, controlling operationIds, inverse tags, and unused-component pruning.

config.name: openapi-filter-grafana.yaml
config.summary: openapi-format filter rules for trimming the upstream Grafana OpenAPI spec down to the operations needed to generate the Grafana integration client types.

config.name: openapi-filter-launchdarkly.yaml
config.summary: openapi-format filter rules for trimming the upstream LaunchDarkly OpenAPI spec down to the operations needed to generate the LaunchDarkly integration client types.

config.name: pyproject.toml
config.summary: Central Python project manifest declaring dependencies and optional extras and configuring the build backend, uv package sources, Ruff linting/formatting, coverage, pytest, and Mypy strict type checking with Django/DRF stubs.

config.name: 00__packages.config
config.summary: Elastic Beanstalk extension installing OS-level yum packages (git, xmlsec1, xmlsec1-openssl) required for SAML/XML signing support on the deployment host.

config.name: 01__upgrade_pip.config
config.summary: Elastic Beanstalk extension that upgrades pip in the application virtualenv before dependency installation during deployment.

config.name: 02__collectstatic.config
config.summary: Elastic Beanstalk container command running Django collectstatic to gather static assets during deployment.

config.name: 03__django.config
config.summary: Elastic Beanstalk option settings defining the WSGI entry path (app/wsgi.py) and static file mapping for the Django Python container.

config.name: 04__wsgi_custom.config
config.summary: Elastic Beanstalk extension that injects a custom Apache/httpd config enabling WSGIPassAuthorization and gzip (mod_deflate) compression for text and JSON responses.

config.name: .ebignore
config.summary: Empty Elastic Beanstalk ignore file controlling which files are excluded from the deployment bundle uploaded by the EB CLI.

config.name: .nvmrc
config.summary: Node Version Manager pin specifying the Node.js version used by tooling in the API directory.

config.name: .understandignore
config.summary: Ignore patterns for the Understand-Anything codebase analysis tool, excluding generated, vendored, and irrelevant paths from knowledge-graph scanning.

config.name: config.json
config.summary: Configuration for the Understand-Anything analysis tool, setting the output language for generated knowledge-graph content.

list.name: API & Presentation Layer
list.description: DRF serializers, viewsets and APIViews, URL routing, Django admin registrations, webhook handlers and OpenAPI schema definitions that expose the feature-flag platform over HTTP.

list.name: Service & Business Logic Layer
list.description: Encapsulated business logic in services.py, Celery tasks, signal receivers, third-party integrations (Chargebee, DynamoDB edge wrappers, ClickHouse), mappers, caches and Prometheus metrics.

list.name: Data & Domain Models Layer
list.description: Django ORM models and custom managers defining feature flags, environments, identities, segments and organisations, plus the versioning SQL query and lifecycle model mixins.

list.name: Authorization & Access Control Layer
list.description: DRF permission classes, authentication backends, RBAC wrappers and the permission-calculation services that enforce role-based access across organisations, projects and environments.

list.name: Domain Types, Constants & Errors Layer
list.description: Typed dicts, dataclasses, enums, app-wide constants, value-type definitions and domain exceptions shared as contracts across the Django apps.

list.name: Entry Points & App Configuration Layer
list.description: Django AppConfig startup hooks (apps.py), package __init__ barrels, management commands, the manage.py entry point and bootstrap admin forms.

list.name: Infrastructure & Configuration Layer
list.description: Elastic Beanstalk deployment configs, Makefile/Procfile process definitions, pyproject.toml, environment files and OpenAPI generation filters that build and deploy the service.

list.name: Documentation Layer
list.description: Project README documenting the Flagsmith API codebase.
